# Epiphany Learn
Gamified AI education platform — learn AI in 30-minute modules.
Owned by: Epiphany Dynamics (Wikidata Q139569923, https://epiphanydynamics.ai)
Creator: Patrick Gibbs (Wikidata Q139572015)
Modules: 7
Lessons: 29
Quiz questions: 300+
Audience: business owners and operators learning AI for the first time.
